creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
The following patch helped me to build server (had to disable mroonga):

--- extra/mariabackup/CMakeLists.txt.orig       2019-04-01 17:03:56.000000000 +0300                                                
+++ extra/mariabackup/CMakeLists.txt    2019-04-18 22:16:44.346138000 +0300                                                        
@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@                                                                                                                
 TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(mbstream                                                                                                    
   mysys                                                                                                                           
   crc                                                                                                                             
+  sql                                                                                                                             
 )                                                                                                                                 
 ADD_DEPENDENCIES(mbstream GenError)
